⭐ Flagship Product

THINOL — Our Best Seller

Engineered for high solvency and optimal evaporation rates, THINOL is GOPI INDUSTRIES' benchmark product — a petroleum ether-based reducer cum MTO that delivers superior performance as a paint thinner and solvent across industrial and decorative applications.

⚗️ High Solvency ⏱️ Optimal Evaporation Rate 🏭 Industrial Grade 🎨 Decorative Use ✅ Consistent Quality
#1
Best-Selling Product
MTO
Petroleum Ether Reducer
B2B
Industrial & Dealer Network
✔
Batch Consistent Quality
Our Pillars

Why Choose GOPI INDUSTRIES

Built on three core pillars: Operational Excellence, Dealer Prosperity, and Product Integrity — delivering value at every level.

🏆

Product Integrity

Strict control over chemical formulation, production, and output consistency. Every batch meets the same high standard — batch after batch.

💰

Value-Engineered Pricing

Competitive pricing without compromising performance. Our positioning: "Value-Engineered Performance Coatings" that eliminate the need for multiple vendors.

🤝

Dealer Empowerment

Channel partners benefit from strong margins, consistent supply, and long-term growth opportunities. A true dealer-first distribution model.

🏭

Operational Excellence

Transitioning to SOP-driven, lean manufacturing systems for zero-defect production and scalable efficiency across our 16,000 sq. ft. facility.

🔬

In-House R&D Lab

Formulation accuracy and batch consistency assured through our dedicated quality assurance laboratory and continuous product development efforts.

🌱

Innovation-Driven Growth

Continuously evolving products — from eco-friendly coatings to advanced waterproofing — guided by the philosophy of "Discovering Liquids."

Product Portfolio

Complete Coating Solutions

Decorative

Decorative Paints

Hi-gloss luxury emulsion for interiors and exteriors. Premium finish in any shade on demand.

🏠Interior and exterior walls of homes, offices, and commercial buildings.
Enquire Now →
Industrial

Gold Enamel

Oil-based dual pack gold paint with premium metallic shine. No blackening guarantee.

🏗️Machinery, structural steel, industrial flooring, and manufacturing facilities.
Enquire Now →
Base Coat

Apple Cement Primer

Water-based acrylic cement primer. Emulsion finish base, extra bright with full exterior coverage.

🧱New plaster, metal surfaces, wood, and all surfaces before final paint application.
Enquire Now →
Surface Prep

Wall Putty

Polymer-based acrylic white cement putty. Full whiteness and maximum covering power.

✏️Pre-paint preparation on new plaster, repaint jobs, and crack-filling.
Enquire Now →
Finish

A-1 Super Coat Polish

Ready-made spirit polish for all wood types. Melamine base, no extra material needed.

🪞Furniture, doors, window frames, flooring, and wooden fixtures.
Enquire Now →
⭐ Flagship

THINOL — Thinner / MTO

Petroleum ether-based reducer with high solvency and optimal evaporation rate. Batch-consistent quality.

⚗️Diluting oil-based paints, cleaning spray equipment, and industrial solvent applications.
Enquire Now →
Solvent

Silvero Aluminium Paint

Premium aluminium paint with metallic finish, bright shine, and no darkening. 50ml to 20L.

🔧Decorative and industrial metallic coating on metal, wood, and machinery surfaces.
Enquire Now →
Specialty

Stripp Now — Paint Remover

Fast-acting paint remover. Works without heavy scrubbing on metal, cement, plastic, and wood.

🔨Renovation projects, old building refurbishment, and surface stripping before repainting.
Enquire Now →
Waterproof

Apple Dampfree

Elastomeric waterproofing with nano-fibre technology. 10-year guarantee with temp reduction.

🏚️Basements, wet areas, bathrooms, exterior walls, and moisture-prone structures.
Enquire Now →
Energy Saving

Apple Cool Plus

Heat reflecting paint — cools approx 10°C. 100% acrylic silicone elastomeric roof sealer.

☀️Factory sheds, rooftops, industrial warehouses, and solar-exposed surfaces.
Enquire Now →

About Us

A Vision Born in Amravati

What started as a single entrepreneurial aspiration has grown into a structured regional manufacturing powerhouse in the Indian coatings sector.

🌱

Our Story

Founded in 2007 by Mr. Sumit Khandelwal, GOPI INDUSTRIES was built on the recognition of immense potential within India's expanding infrastructure and construction ecosystem. From a small-scale operation, it has grown into a structured unit with strong regional influence.

🎯

Our Mission

To provide high-performance, value-engineered coating products through manufacturing excellence, rigorous quality control, and a dealer-first distribution model that ensures accessibility and reliability across all sectors.

🔭

Our Vision

To redefine the standards of surface protection through innovative liquid solutions, becoming the benchmark for quality and reliability in the Indian coatings industry — guided by our philosophy, "Discovering Liquids."

📩 Connect with Us
Manufacturing Infrastructure

Built for Scale & Precision

Our MIDC Amravati facility is designed for efficient production, scalable output, and consistent quality assurance at every step.

Sq. Ft. Total Area

Core Processes
🏅
District Industries Center — Runner-Up Award
Recognised for manufacturing excellence and industrial development contribution, 2022–2023
⚙️
Core Production Processes
Grinding, Mixing, and Filtering — three precise stages that ensure every product meets exact formulation and quality specifications.
🔬
In-House R&D & Quality Assurance Lab
Dedicated laboratory for formulation accuracy, batch consistency verification, and ongoing product improvement aligned with industrial standards.
🤖
Lean Manufacturing & Automation
Actively adopting Lean Manufacturing principles and scalable automation to reduce waste, improve efficiency, and achieve zero-defect production at scale.
📋
SOP-Driven Operations
Transitioning to fully system-oriented workflows and Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for institutional stability and operational scalability.
